steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Watch Your Step and Golden Connection. A correct answer must state something both sculptures share — not describe only one, compare their sizes, or contrast them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Grimanesa Amorós is the artist behind *Watch Your Step*, a sculpture made of smooth multicolored LED domes.’: describes only Watch Your Step. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘At 100,000 cubic feet in size, Grimanesa Amorós's *Golden Connection* cuts a larger figure than the 335-cubic-foot *Watch Your Step*.’: highlights a size difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘*Watch Your Step* is an LED light sculpture made by Grimanesa Amorós, as is *Golden Connection*.’: the phrase "as is" directly links both sculptures as LED works by the same artist — a clear similarity. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘The smooth LED domes of Grimanesa Amorós's *Watch Your Step* stand in contrast to the tangled LED tubes of *Golden Connection*.’: explicitly contrasts the two sculptures. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
